title: Haywen Resources
description: This resource pack has resources for the Haywen RP smp server, mod packs and other IP's
body:
The Haywen RP resource pack is used for the Haywen RP mod packs and SMP server.

It includes Custom item textures in use of optifine or CIT, as well as wing textures.

![](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fimg.guildedcdn.com%2FContentMediaGenericFiles%2Ff0b51870bbac21bbf9f3d50d0b22db08-Full.webp%3Fw%3D1840%26amp%3Bh%3D0066&n=-1)
